attestation_note: Three errors corrected: (1) Teradyne work reframed from 'event-driven backend system components' to UI components + API integration — original dropped the WPF/UI half to fit a backend narrative; (2) removed unverifiable metric 'improved fault tolerance by 35%' (fault tolerance is not a measurable percentage); (3) MedSignal corrected from implied solo ownership to team project (contributor, not sole owner).

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Systems
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology

highlights.claim: Implemented UI components (WPF) and API integration in C# for diagnostics and system state transitions; validated service interfaces across a multi-component system
Conducted CPU/memory profiling, log analysis, and root cause analysis to diagnose production performance issues across multi-component failures; documented corrective actions
Architected a caching and lazy-loading strategy using delegate-based factories for efficient resource access
highlights.metric: reduced initial memory consumption by 30%, improved responsiveness by 25%

highlights.claim: Built reusable test utilities and service mocks contributing to CI/CD pipelines (GoCD)
Designed Java/Spring Boot backend services with validated REST API contracts for high-volume financial transaction workflows
highlights.metric: improved throughput by 20%, reduced latency by 20% under peak traffic

highlights.claim: Implemented Apache Kafka for high-throughput asynchronous messaging between distributed services, improving system decoupling and fault tolerance
highlights.verifiable: qualitative — removed invented '35%' figure; fault tolerance not measurable as a percentage

highlights.claim: Designed data access layers with optimized SQL queries, indexing, and caching for low-latency retrieval against large financial datasets
Built CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins) for automated build/test/deploy to Kubernetes with Docker
highlights.metric: cut deployment time by 25%, rollback incidents by 20%

highlights.claim: Instrumented applications for observability with Prometheus and Grafana (metrics, structured logging, distributed tracing)

projects.name: MedSignal — Distributed Signal Detection Platform
highlights: Python/FastAPI backend with validated REST API contracts; Pydantic v2 validation and OpenAPI specs
Data access layer with Redis caching + Bloom-filter dedup for low-latency retrieval across 16M+ records, processed with Spark Structured Streaming
Deployed via Docker Compose with structured logging, latency benchmarking, performance dashboards
Contributed to unit/integration/SLA test automation with pytest and testcontainers

projects.name: PE Org-AI-R — Private Equity AI Readiness Platform
highlights: FastAPI backend with SSE streaming + React analytics dashboard; structured logging, latency benchmarking, performance dashboards on AWS
LangChain agentic workflows synthesizing 69–300+ signals per company into structured outputs stored in Snowflake, integrated via REST API

projects.name: Real-Time Loan Processing & Management System
highlights: Spring Boot platform for real-time loan disbursement/approval; RESTful APIs with optimized PostgreSQL schemas, stored procedures, indexing for high-volume low-latency transactional workloads
